bird.name: Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher
bird.summary: The rufous-breasted blue flycatcher (Cyornis camarinensis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the Philippine…

locations.name: Bulusan Volcano Natural Park
locations.summary: The Bulusan Volcano Natural Park is a 3,673-hectare (9,080-acre) protected area of rainforest surrounding Mount Bulusan…

locations.name: Caramoan National Park
locations.summary: The Caramoan National Park is a 347-hectare (860-acre) national park and protected area in Camarines Sur, Philippines.

relations.subject: Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher
relations.evidence: Prior to 2025, this species was listed as a vulnerable species. It is found in the protected areas in Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Caramoan National Park and Mount Isarog but actual protection from deforestation is lax

relations.subject: Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher
relations.evidence: The population is believed to be declining with populations estimated between 2,500 and 10,000 mature individuals with populations believe to be declining due to ongoing habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
